description: Required input dimensions and cases the spec-app-consistency-audit headless runner fixture suite must exercise. createAppAuditFixture records which case it builds; auditFixtureCoverage fails when a required case is neither covered by a fixture call nor declared as a known_gap.

case_descriptions.minimal: A short PRD with page, flow, confirmation, analytics, i18n, and industry-term hints is staged.

case_descriptions.local_materialized: A local figma-context.json with a frame and components is staged.

dimensions.description: Route coverage including multi-language navigation references.

case_descriptions.multi_language: Code references both English route keys and localized in-app text or PRD descriptions.

dimensions.description: KMP shared module presence in the source tree.

case_descriptions.absent: Source tree has no shared/ KMP module.
case_descriptions.present: Source tree includes shared/ Gradle module and KMP common-main code.

case_descriptions.empty: Source tree has no analytics call sites.
case_descriptions.missing_required_events: Source tree has at least one analytics call site but does not cover all PRD-required events.

case_descriptions.missing: Source tree has no Android-style values/strings.xml or equivalent i18n resource.
